learning_objectives: Use present simple with he/she (add -s or -es to the verb).
Know the -es rule for verbs ending in o, x, ch, sh, s.
Talk about other people's daily routines.

questions.prompt_en: My brother ___ to school every day.
questions.explanation_en: 'Go' ends in 'o', so in 3rd person singular we add '-es': goes.
questions.explanation_ar: الفعل 'go' ينتهي بـ 'o'، لذا في المفرد الغائب نضيف '-es': goes.
hints: go → goes (ينتهي بـ o → أضف es)
He / She / It → فعل + s أو es

questions.explanation_en: With 'my mother' (she), add '-s' to the verb: eats.

choices: She reads a book every night.
She read a book every night.
She reading a book every night.
She is reads a book every night.
questions.correct_answer: She reads a book every night.
questions.explanation_en: Present simple with she/he: add -s to the verb. She reads.
questions.explanation_ar: المضارع البسيط مع she/he: أضف -s للفعل. She reads.

questions.explanation_en: 'Have' is irregular: I/You/We/They have — He/She/It HAS.
questions.explanation_ar: فعل 'have' غير منتظم: I/You/We/They have — He/She/It has.
hints: have → has مع He/She (استثناء غير منتظم)

questions.prompt_en: I sleep at 10 PM. My sister ___ at 11 PM.
questions.prompt_ar: أنا أنام الساعة العاشرة. أختي ___ الساعة الحادية عشرة.
